summary: Comprehensive Story → Video Pipeline Production Verification completed. 20/21 backend tests passed (1 network timeout error during heavy load - not a code issue). All pipeline stages working correctly. Multiple E2E test jobs completed successfully in ~100-110 seconds. Frontend phases (input/processing/done/error) all working. Video outputs accessible and downloadable from R2 storage.

minor.issue: Read timeout errors occurred during heavy pipeline processing (not a code bug, network congestion)

issues: Cookie consent banner overlays bottom UI elements - consider dismissing it on click

critical_code_review_comments: pipeline_engine.py: All 5 stages (scenes, images, voices, render, upload) working correctly
pipeline_engine.py: Per-scene checkpointing for images and voices verified - resume works
pipeline_engine.py: Credit deduction on job create (50/80/120) and refund on failure confirmed
pipeline_engine.py: Copyright blocking (Mickey Mouse, Disney, etc.) correctly rejects with 400
pipeline_worker.py: 3 dedicated workers running, processing jobs concurrently
pipeline_routes.py: All endpoints properly authenticated (create, status, resume, user-jobs, workers/status)
pipeline_routes.py: Job creation returns instantly (<1s response time)
StoryVideoPipeline.js: data-testid attributes present on all key elements
StoryVideoPipeline.js: Video player, download button, timing breakdown all visible in done phase

success_rate.backend: 95% (20/21 tests passed, 1 network timeout during load)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (All UI phases verified, all elements clickable)

seed_data_creation: Created 2 test pipeline jobs during testing: TEST_Iteration150_Performance_Test, TEST_Iteration150_Run1_BraveLion
context_for_next_testing_agent: Story Video Pipeline fully functional. Multiple successful E2E runs verified. Pipeline completes in ~100-110 seconds. Resume from checkpoint working. Video outputs accessible on R2. All phases tested via Playwright automation.

GET /api/pipeline/status/{job_id}.returns: full progress with stages, scene_progress, timing, output_url

GET /api/pipeline/user-jobs.returns: list of user's pipeline jobs sorted by created_at
